# Sources

ALL 2025 Information

- [General Info](https://info.healthconnect.vermont.gov/compare-plans/medicaid-and-dr-dynasaur)

* [Eligibility](https://info.healthconnect.vermont.gov/compare-plans/eligibility-tables)


# Summary
Though there's structure and information set up about different tiers of eligibility and premiums, since 2014 in reality it seems like everyone has just used the main eligibility tables. For now, then, we just use this.

# Logic
For now, we're just saying either you DO or DO NOT qualify for medicaid based on household composition by comparing gross monthly income to limit.
